title: Enchantio
description: Vanilla-friendly custom enchantments for paper servers
body: # Enchantio Modern vanilla-style minecraft enchantment plugin for paper servers. All enchants are registered as proper enchantments and fully work with vanilla enchanting system and vanilla /enchant command. Plugin contains multiple enchantments and curses that can be configured to your liking. You can decide if the enchant should appear in enchantment table, level cost for applying it to an item in an anvil and many more. - Enchantment list - Documentation
